nasb.text: Nevertheless, the Lord your God was not willing to listen to Balaam, but the Lord your God turned the curse into a blessing for you because the Lord your God loves you.

esv.text: But the Lord your God would not listen to Balaam; instead the Lord your God turned the curse into a blessing for you, because the Lord your God loved you.

cnv.text: 但耶和華你的　神不願聽從巴蘭；耶和華你的　神使咒詛的話變為你的祝福，因為耶和華你的　神愛你。

ccb.text: 但你们的上帝耶和华不听巴兰的话，反而把咒诅变为祝福，因为祂爱你们。
